description_long: This object is a stylized laptop with a rectangular, flat base and a thin, upright display. The keyboard area features a grid of raised, square keys and a large rectangular touchpad below the keys. The display is bordered by a thick bezel and is entirely black, suggesting it is powered off. The exterior lid of the laptop displays a pixelated, abstract logo in black, reminiscent of a simplified apple or geometric shape. The sides of the laptop are plain, with no visible ports or buttons. The overall color scheme is a uniform light gray with black accents for the screen, keys, and logo.
description: A gray laptop with a black screen, grid-like keyboard, and a pixelated black logo on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black screen, grid keyboard, and large touchpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open screen, with keyboard keys visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pixelated black logo centered on the gray lid.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's thickness and the keyboard layout.
attribute_brand_logo: A pixelated, abstract black logo resembling a simplified apple or geometric shape is centered on the back of the lid.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard layout is a generic grid with square keys and a large rectangular touchpad; no specific language or special keys are discernible.
